# Vendor Assets (Local)

Bu proje CDN kullanmaz. Asagidaki dosyalari **lokal** olarak bu klasor altina koyun:

- `public/assets/vendor/bootstrap/css/bootstrap.min.css`
- `public/assets/vendor/bootstrap/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/jquery/jquery.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/datatables/jquery.dataTables.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/datatables/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/datatables/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css`
- `public/assets/vendor/select2/js/select2.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/select2/css/select2.min.css`
- `public/assets/vendor/sweetalert2/sweetalert2.all.min.js`
- `public/assets/vendor/sweetalert2/sweetalert2.min.css`

Not: Bu dosyalar projede lokal olarak mevcuttur. Surum guncellemesi yapacaksaniz ayni dosya adlarini koruyun.
